cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out the best title for this passage. So, the question is asking which of the four options (A to D) would be the most appropriate title. Let me read through the passage again to get a good grasp. The passage starts by saying that if you want to see the effects of global warming, you should head north, and Will Steger is going to take us there. Steger is a famous polar explorer and environmentalist who has been warning about global warming. He's leading a team on a dogsled trip across Ellesmere Island in the Canadian Arctic. They'll be sharing videos and stories online so people can follow their journey. The team includes some well-known adventurers. The passage mentions that climate change has already changed the Arctic's geography, making it harder to reach the North
